atlassian search-jira-issues-using-jql

Search issues with JQL

USAGE:
  atlassian search-jira-issues-using-jql [options]

REQUIRED:
  --cloud-id <string>
      Required.
      Cloud ID
  --jql <string>
      Required.
      JQL query

OPTIONAL:
  --max-results <number>
      Max results
  --next-page-token <string>
      Page token

GLOBAL OPTIONS:
  --json <json object>
      Provide the entire tool input as JSON. This bypasses flag parsing.

  --help
      Show this help message.

OUTPUT:
  Prints the upstream tool result directly.
